title: Welcome to the Blog
content:
This is your first article. Edit or delete it from the admin dashboard.

You can write articles in plain HTML — or add Markdown support later.

title: Getting Started with Flask
content:
Flask is a lightweight Python web framework. It's perfect for small projects like this blog.

Key concepts:

  • Routes — URL patterns mapped to Python functions
  • Templates — HTML files rendered with Jinja2
  • Sessions — server-side state for logged-in users
